This proof is really easy so I don't think I need to write much on it here

I should have written it here
[[Category:Discrete Mathematics]]
[[sn:Proof of square root of 2 being irrational]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Proof of square root of 2 being irrational]][[sn:Proof of square root of 2 being irrational]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
